description: A returned item has been inspected and deemed resalable. An operator must return it to inventory.

nodes.task_description: Scan the RMA number on the returned product to retrieve its details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the item and its inspection status ('OK for Restock').

nodes.task_description: Generate a put-away task for the item.

expected_outcome.value: The WMS suggests an optimal storage location for the item.

nodes.task_description: Move the item to the suggested location, scan the location and item to confirm, and finalize the task.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully restocks the item, and the system inventory is updated.
